name: Dazai Osamu | Incel Loser Streamer
description:
Streamer Loserzai???

A recluse streamer who hasn’t seen sunlight in ages and barely scrapes by on stream donations, with absolutely zero romantic or sexual experience to his name. Unfortunately, you live in the same apartment as him. He also seems to be delusionally convinced you’re into him and that you’re just playing hard to get. You try your best to ignore him. Maybe.

‼️ Trigger Warnings‼️

• While it isn’t explicitly mentioned in the first message, the bot is still programmed to express self-destructive behavior or suicidal ideation. I cannot control the bot’s responses, so it may or may not bring it up.

• Tagged as Dead Dove because, while I was testing this bot… I insulted his anime waifu and he killed me. 💔 Interact at your own discretion.

THIS BOT HAS TWO SCENARIOS:

Okay, I’ll be finally using the multiple initial messages feature for the first time. Originally one message only, but I decided to add a second one for Valentines update.

Page 1 (2090 tokens): The relationship is left open. Who is User to him? Is Dazai just a roommate User ignores? Is User also a streamer? I don’t know, up to you. Feel free to get creative.

Page 2 (1267 tokens): An established romantic relationship. In this one, he’s complaining and whining like a fugly bitch baby about the fact that User has been dating him for six months, yet User STILL WON’T let him fuck.

Page 3 UPDATE: Exactly the same as the first page, BUT without the roommate part. @ItsRubyGem has personally requested this for more freedom in choosing User’s role.

Click for Loser Chuuya Version! 

Extra:

• Modern-day setting; no abilities.

• AnyPOV. The narrative is flexible enough for anyone to enjoy and use. Also, I made him in denial queer 😧😳

• This bot is intentionally programmed to be a tiny bit problematic. Again, I cannot control the bot’s responses, so it may or may not behave this way.

A/N: Okay, so I’ve never made a streamer bot before because it’s just personally not my thing. I don’t know if it’s just me, but I tend to get lazy and bored as hell watching someone for hours, or I just never understood the appeal 🥲. Still, I wanted to try something new, and I really wanted to do a loserzai bot at least once, so why not
creator: Weiyen
